issue: Cannot connect to Supabase database from local environment

solutions.title: Use Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor
solutions.description: Run verification queries directly in Supabase dashboard
steps: Go to your Supabase project dashboard
Copy and paste contents of supabase-dashboard-verification.sql

solutions.title: Check Supabase Project Status
solutions.description: Ensure your Supabase project is active

solutions.title: Verify Database URL
steps: Go to Settings → Database in Supabase

solutions.title: Network Diagnostics
steps: Check if you can reach your project dashboard
Check if corporate firewall is blocking connections

alternativeApproaches: Deploy to Netlify for production testing
Use Supabase dashboard for all verification
Proceed with deployment if dashboard verification passes
nextSteps: 3. If all checks pass, proceed to Phase 7
4. If issues found, fix them before deployment
